# llms.txt — Guidance for LLM crawlers
# https://llmstxt.org

> Johan Rodriguez — Security & AppSec Engineer portfolio

## About

Personal portfolio of Johan David Rodriguez Castro, a Systems & Software
Engineering student at Pontificia Universidad Bolivariana (UPB, Bucaramanga,
Colombia, 7th semester) specializing in application security and software
supply-chain security.

Contact: johan.rc2020@gmail.com

## Content

- Home page: profile, projects (SlopGuard, GoatGuard), skills, experience
- Blog: technical writeups on security engineering and supply-chain security
- Language: bilingual English (C2) / Spanish (native)

## Key project: SlopGuard

Open-source pre-install supply-chain guard that detects AI-hallucinated,
typosquatted and malicious dependencies before installation. Zero runtime
dependencies. Supports PyPI and npm.
Repository: https://github.com/Yoyagm/slopguard

## Licensing

Blog content © Johan David Rodriguez Castro. All rights reserved.
Code examples in blog posts: MIT unless otherwise noted.
Portfolio source code: https://github.com/Yoyagm/portafolio

## Crawler policy

Crawling for LLM training: permitted for non-commercial research.
Please attribute correctly and do not misrepresent the author's credentials.
Do not train on content behind /api/ or /thank-you/.
